name: StatePulse API
short_description: Pay-per-call live telemetry and utilities for AI agents.
description: StatePulse API exposes narrow, machine-readable live telemetry, environmental metrics, transit state vectors, and real-time utilities AI agents can call instead of guessing: coordinates, speed, air quality, weather deviations, DNS, and calendar holidays. Paid per request with x402 on Base USDC. Served from the same worker as the former PageDiff API.

services.name: Barcode Lookup
services.description: Resolves a UPC/EAN or ISBN barcode into detailed product metadata.

services.name: Flight Tracker
services.description: Track live airspace state vectors for a specific ICAO24 hex code.

services.name: Air Quality Index
services.description: Retrieves live localized air quality indices (AQI) and pollutant levels.

services.name: Transit Alerts & Delays
services.description: Check transit delays, active alerts, and schedule status updates for supported cities.

services.name: Weather Anomaly Checker
services.description: Compares current weather conditions with a 10-year historical average.

services.name: Radio Stream Finder
services.description: Resolves direct Shoutcast/Icecast streaming URLs from an open directory.

services.name: DNS Propagation Check
services.description: Checks global MX, TXT, A, and CNAME propagation status using Cloudflare DoH.

services.name: Brand Colors & Asset Grabber
services.description: Extracts brand logos and theme colors for any public business URL.

services.name: Geopolitical Prediction Odds
services.description: Retrieves live betting market contract odds from PredictIt.

services.name: USGS River Gauge Flow
services.description: Queries live US river level and streamflow gauge height metrics using USGS NWIS.

services.name: Public Bank Holiday Check
services.description: Retrieves local bank and public holidays across 100+ countries.

services.name: USGS Live Earthquake Seismic Activity Tracker
services.description: Queries the USGS Earthquake Hazards API for recent earthquakes exceeding a minimum magnitude.

services.name: NASA FIRMS Satellite Active Forest Fire Detector
services.description: Scans active wildfire reports and incidents via public NASA FIRMS satellite active fire alert feeds to locate active blazes. Matches: active wildfire detector, NASA FIRMS fire coordinates, forest fire satellite alert, wildfire tracking map, satellite burn zones detector.

services.name: NOAA Live Solar Storm & Geomagnetic Alert System
services.description: Retrieves the current planetary K-Index and active solar storms from NOAA SWPC. Matches: space weather solar storm alert, planetary k-index monitor, geomagnetic activity tracker, solar flare satellite warnings, coronal mass ejection tracking.

services.name: Hyperlocal Pollen & Allergen Live Forecast
services.description: Queries pollen allergen index counts (grass, birch, oak) by coordinate using Open-Meteo.

services.name: NOAA NDBC Wave Height & Sea Temperature Tracker
services.description: Fetches live observation data for a specific NOAA marine buoy station.

services.name: USGS Streamflow River Gauge Height & Flood Alert System
services.description: Scans active USGS gauge heights in a US state for potential river flooding. Matches: streamflow flood alerts, USGS gauge height warnings, river level flood checker, water streamflow warnings, river overflow stage alerts.

services.name: Open-Meteo Current UV Index & Sun-Safety Triage
services.description: Retrieves the current solar UV Index and calculates sun safety burn times.

services.name: Open-Meteo Current Lightning Strike Potential
services.description: Queries the hourly lightning potential indices for coordinates.

services.name: Global AIS Cargo Ship & Vessel Location Tracker
services.description: Resolves the current coordinate telemetry and voyage details for a cargo ship by MMSI number. Matches: cargo ship location tracker, AIS transponder coordinate lookup, find container vessel by MMSI, ocean logistics cargo positioning, track shipping container vessel, sea lanes transit tracker.

services.name: OpenData European Railway Station Board & Delays
services.description: Queries live train departures and schedule delays for European transit hubs using transport.opendata.ch.

services.name: US/EU Toll Road Route Fee Calculator
services.description: Estimates the approximate toll road costs for a route based on distance and state-level averages. Matches: toll road pricing, toll calculator, toll highway fees, driving trip expense calculator, truck route toll cost checker, logistics delivery overhead.

services.name: Open Charge Map EV Charging Station Live Finder
services.description: Locates public electric vehicle charging stations within a given radius using Open Charge Map.

services.name: OpenStreetMap OSRM Driving Distance & Duration Calculator
services.description: Computes the shortest driving distance and duration between two coordinates using the public OSRM engine.

services.name: OpenSky Network Live Airport Flight Board
services.description: Retrieves the recent live arrivals list for a specific airport by ICAO code. Matches: airport arrivals board list, check arriving aircraft, OpenSky schedule flight landing board, flight terminal details.

services.name: FAA US Airport Live Ground Stop & Delay Checker
services.description: Queries the FAA public API for active delays, ground stops, and weather statuses for a US airport. Matches: air traffic control delays, US airport ground stops, flight weather delays, FAA flight restrictions, airport layout status.

services.name: US State & County Sales Tax Rate Triage
services.description: Locates the combined sales tax rate (state, county, local) for a US ZIP code using Zippopotam. Matches: sales tax rate calculator, zip code tax lookup, commercial sales tax checker, e-commerce tax estimator, state county city tax rates.

services.name: USPTO PatentsView Database Live Search
services.description: Queries the official public USPTO PatentsView database to fetch status and info for a patent. Matches: USPTO patent lookup, search patent number info, patent inventor checker, patent filing date tracker, technology patent registry search.

services.name: USPTO Trademark Registry Brand Name Checker
services.description: Performs a preliminary conflict check on a word against public trademark registries. Matches: trademark check, brand conflict check, domain availability name checker, intellectual property brand screening.

services.name: Nasdaq Stock Exchange Circuit Breaker & Halts Tracker
services.description: Parses the Nasdaq Trader RSS feed for active or recent stock trading halts.

services.name: Federal Reserve Current Target & Discount Rate
services.description: Retrieves the current federal funds target interest rate.

services.name: Etherscan/Basescan Verified Contract ABI Resolver
services.description: Resolves the contract interface JSON (ABI) for verified smart contracts on Base or Ethereum. Matches: get verified smart contract source interface, Basescan verified ABI fetcher, Etherscan contract JSON interface loader, decode transaction calldata helpers, verified contract methods parser.

services.name: EVM Transaction Execution Simulator
services.description: Runs eth_call state simulation against the Base blockchain RPC to check for transaction reverts. Matches: EVM revert checks, test contract call, inspect transaction failure, dry-run solidity method, gas estimator, test token swap failure, simulate multisig transaction execution.

services.name: Base Blockchain Gas Fee History & Trend Tracker
services.description: Scans recent block gas details to estimate the minimum, average, and maximum base fee.

services.name: Multi-Chain Wallet Token Balance Scanner
services.description: Scans native balance and ERC-20 token balances for a wallet address on Base or Ethereum.

services.name: Binance Futures Live Perp Funding Rates Ticker
services.description: Queries current pricing and funding rate margins for perpetual swap contracts from Binance.

services.name: DNSSEC & CAA Record Security Auditor
services.description: Queries DNSSEC (DS) and Certification Authority Authorization (CAA) records for a domain using Cloudflare DoH.

services.name: SSL Certificate Handshake Expiration Monitor
services.description: Extracts certificate validity dates and expiration countdown for a domain using CertSpotter logs.

services.name: HTTP Security Header Quality Auditor
services.description: Fetches target URL headers to score configurations (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options).

services.name: Geocoding City Timezone & Local Time Checker
services.description: Resolves the local time, offset, and daylight savings status for a city name using Open-Meteo Geocoding.

services.name: USGS Streamflow River Water Temperature Monitor
services.description: Queries live stream water temperature telemetry from active USGS gauges in a US state.
